title: Even Fibonacci Index Criterion
statement: F_n is even if and only if n is divisible by 3.

title: Principle of Mathematical Induction
statement: A property holding at 0 and preserved by successor holds for all natural numbers.

title: Topological Ordering of Finite DAGs
statement: Every finite directed acyclic graph admits a topological ordering.

title: Matrix Form of Linear Recurrences
statement: A finite-order linear recurrence can be represented by iterated matrix multiplication.
